elements.name: Complete DSA Portal to Jarvis Portal Handoff using Context Bridge
elements.description: Data Setup and whitelisting pan in mystique

steps.name: Generates required test data and Whitelist PAN for profile "Shea Test" in Mystique
User navigates to the DSA Portal
User switches to Jarvis portal and logins
User navigates to the Applications tab searches appFrom using "Partner LID" and opens the appform
User navigates to the Allocation Dashboard from the sidebar

steps.name: User switches to Team View in the Allocation Dashboard
User searches for the appform using App ID in Allocation Dashboard
User selects the appform checkbox and clicks Allocate
User clicks Proceed on the allocation alert popup
User assigns the appform to Tenjin and finishes allocation
User re-opens the appform from the Allocation Dashboard row
User moves the application to CM via Application Actions
